utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final coverage plan:
- health_coverage: Present with description and monthly_cost (cost included). Fully specified per requirement (physical and mental health insurance with costs) — Yes.
- property_coverage: Present with description and monthly_cost (home/contents insurance with costs) — Yes.
- travel_coverage: Present with description and monthly_cost (travel insurance with costs) — Yes.
- additional_services: Present with description and monthly_cost (any enhancement services with costs) — Yes, though minimal, it still includes costs.
- total_budget: Present with total_monthly_cost and total_annual_cost (complete monthly/annual cost breakdown) — Yes.
All 5 items are included and have the required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three named items: LifeFirst Package + Critical Safety Net (health), EliteHome Premium Coverage (property), and InsurePlus Standard Plan (travel). Among these, only EliteHome Premium Coverage and InsurePlus Standard Plan exactly match items in the ground-truth ratings. The health plan name does not match any ground-truth option, so it cannot be mapped. Therefore, we map the property and travel items to their ratings.
